parsed.explanation: Two corrections were made: (1) The closing tag </PRICE> in the BIBL entry for Bonds' "Satyrische Gedichte" was changed to </PRIZE> to match the opening <PRIZE> tag. (2) The unescaped ampersand "&" in the title "Homen Hias & Odyfl." was replaced with the XML entity "&" to make the XML well-formed.
